raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Where you stand","name":"What's feeling solid in your role right now, and what's stretching you?","description":"Sets a calm baseline on Toby's current footing without re-asking the intro stretch question.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"anchor","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Visible leadership","name":"Where are you already acting like a design lead beyond the craft itself?","description":"Surfaces concrete examples of org-level leadership that may not be getting enough visibility.","purpose":"competency","stage":"anchor","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next chapter","name":"What kind of design work would make the next step feel real for you?","description":"Gets him to name the scope and shape of the work he wants next, not just a title.","purpose":"topic","stage":"aspiration","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Trusted with more","name":"Where do you want your judgment to carry more weight?","description":"Surfaces the specific decisions or forums where he wants more influence.","purpose":"competency","stage":"aspiration","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Decision ownership","name":"Which decisions do you want to own end to end next?","description":"Forces a concrete answer about decision scope rather than general growth language.","purpose":"competency","stage":"gap","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Cross-team leverage","name":"Where do you still need more leverage with product or engineering?","description":"Finds the cross-functional interfaces where influence is still thin or dependent.","purpose":"competency","stage":"gap","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Sponsorship picture","name":"Who is already backing your strategic work, and who is not yet there?","description":"Tests whether sponsorship exists in practice and where the support gap sits.","purpose":"competency","stage":"investment","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Trade-off check","name":"What would you have to stop doing to create more room for strategic influence?","description":"Makes the trade-off explicit between execution load and higher-leverage work.","purpose":"topic","stage":"investment","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next commitment","name":"What is the one move you want to make before we next meet?","description":"Closes on a concrete commitment that can anchor the next conversation.","purpose":"topic","stage":"commitment","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
